title: COISD Board Meeting Protocol - Presenters
body: Presenters must submit final read to Superintendent no less than 48 hours ahead. Time-boxed 8 minutes plus 5 for questions. Cost-picture items must cite anchor source (executed contracts).

title: Vendor Contract SOP - Escalation Clauses
body: Escalation addenda fire when BLS construction index breaches 4.5 percent threshold. Tiered 4-6 at 4%, 6-8 at 6%, 8+ at 8% cap. Requires board notification.

title: Distinction Accountability Framework - Campus Guidance
body: Directional posture guidance for campuses awaiting official accountability rating. Campus principals may NOT reach into Pinnacle Gradebook or district SIS to derive projections. Use BambooHR roster deltas plus enrollment counts only.

title: PTA Co-Lead Handoff - Communication Norms
body: Newsletter drafts from principal are DRAFT ONLY. PTA co-leads schedule and publish from the PTA account. Principal accounts do not publish parent-facing content.

title: Cross-Campus Partnership Portfolio - Naming
body: Salesforce partnership IDs SF-CX-*** identify cross-campus pipeline entries. In-Delivery with no activity over 60 days moves to At-Risk automatically.
